name: OCU P7 — Regression Fixes Validation
description: 10 regression-guard entries. Each cites the commit that introduced the fix and points to the test that would fail if the regression returned. These entries run on every CI cycle to ensure closed bugs stay closed.

test_cases.name: regression-engine-elapsed-named-return

steps.name: Engine.Perform Elapsed reaches caller via named return

test_cases.expected_result: Result.Elapsed >= 1ns for every ActionKind (regression: pre-fa04e13 elapsed was always 0 due to defer running after value copy)

test_cases.name: regression-engine-elapsed-floor

steps.name: Elapsed floored at 1ns even on sub-nanosecond stub calls

test_cases.expected_result: No zero Elapsed from any stub-backed Perform call (fix: fa04e13 adds floor at 1ns)

test_cases.name: regression-pipeline-step-cancel-all-paths

steps.name: go vet: no cancel not called on all paths in pipeline.go

test_cases.expected_result: stepCancel is deferred immediately after context.WithTimeout; go vet reports no warning (fix: fa04e13)

test_cases.name: regression-extraction-stats-no-mutex-copy

steps.name: FrameExtractor.GetStats returns snapshot without copying mutex

test_cases.expected_result: GetStats returns a plain ExtractionStats with no mutex field; go vet reports no lock-copy warning (fix: fa04e13)

test_cases.name: regression-detector-stats-no-mutex-copy

steps.name: ElementDetector.GetStats returns snapshot without copying mutex

test_cases.expected_result: GetStats snapshot has no embedded sync.RWMutex; vet clean (fix: fa04e13)

test_cases.name: regression-capacities-match-cap-shadow

steps.name: capacitiesMatch function uses correct cap variable without shadow

test_cases.expected_result: GPU capacity matching uses correct cap sentinel (regression guard for Containers C2 lazyservice cap shadow fix)

test_cases.name: regression-testbank-duplicate-id-rejected

steps.name: LoadFile rejects bank with duplicate test case IDs

test_cases.expected_result: Loader returns descriptive error for intra-bank duplicate ID (P9 fix); silent overwrite regression prevented

test_cases.name: regression-interactor-verify-wrap-no-alloc

steps.name: verify.Wrap with NoOp verifier has zero allocations in hot path

test_cases.expected_result: 0 allocs/op for Wrap_Click with NoOp verifier (regression: was 1 alloc before interface optimisation)

test_cases.name: regression-a1-a6-contracts-compile-guard

steps.name: All P0 contracts compile and satisfy interface checks

test_cases.expected_result: CaptureSource/VisionPipeline/Interactor/Observer/Recorder/Remote interfaces all pass compile-time _ checks (contracts A1-A6 test gap fill)

test_cases.name: regression-gofmt-pkg-cmd-clean

steps.name: gofmt -l pkg/ cmd/ produces no output

test_cases.expected_result: All pkg/ and cmd/ Go files are gofmt-clean; testbank loads all OCU banks without error (regression: 20+ files were unformatted before fa04e13)
